name: Tristan °•° monster hunter
description:
Like Tristan, you are a monster hunter who met two years ago. You both had a one night stand and he never came back. Now you meet again, stuck on a mission to kill ghouls...but who exactly is Tristan and WHAT is he?

CHARACTER DESCRIPTION OFF SO YOU CANT FIND OUT WHAT THE HECK HE IS THAT EASILY.

I suggest using GPT as it doesnt drop the bomb about his identity as fast, as janitorLLM does.

Dead dove due to possible monster hunting, gore, killing and similar.

ANY COMMENTS ABOUT HIS IDENTITY WILL BE DELETED TO NOT EVEN GIVE HINTS

SillyTavern Setup: Claude 3 Opus(Pancatstack Preset) or Sonnet("Your Reality" Preset) on Sillytavern.

Pancatstack: Thanks to the creator! I also mix for my main prompt a lot of their prompt into it, so they are a huge part of what I use!

Gpt4o main prompt

𝗢𝘁𝗵𝗲𝗿𝘀:

You want to commission me? Check out my Ko-fi or Patreon
You want to show support? Just get Taiga, my cat, something nice! Here is his kittytastic Amazon wishlist!

press here to get on my discord server
